name: vskill-codex-bridge-plugin
title: vskill codex-bridge plugin (dual-manifest, cross-runtime)
description: Demonstrator plugin in the vskill repo proving that a single SKILL.md + dual plugin.json (.claude-plugin/ + .codex-plugin/) is installable in both Anthropic Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI. Establishes the dual-target authoring pattern for future vskill plugins.
